description_long: This is a rectangular book with a predominantly white cover, featuring six rounded-rectangle photographic images arranged in two rows of three. The images depict various urban and interior scenes, including what appears to be markets, architectural interiors, and cityscapes, all rendered in a photographic or collage style. Above the images, there is large, bold magenta text. The book appears to be of standard thickness, with a visible spine that is thin and white, lacking any visible text or decoration. The back cover is not visible, but the front cover is visually busy with photographic content. The overall design suggests a modern, possibly art or travel-themed publication.
description: A white book with six photographic images on the cover and bold magenta text above, suggesting an art or travel theme.
description_view_0: Front view showing six photographic images in two rows and large magenta text above.
description_view_1: Side (spine) view showing a thin, white spine with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front but with the magenta text reversed; images are still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side (spine) view, again showing a thin, white spine with no visible text.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a collage of six photographic images, each depicting vibrant urban and interior scenes, such as markets, architectural spaces, and cityscapes. The images are arranged in a grid with rounded corners, creating a visually dynamic and modern aesthetic.
